generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T <<<<< MURIATICUM ACIDUM. STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Ravenous hunger, [15] . ► Complete loss of appetite for all food, with a natural taste, and without nausea, [1] . [220.] ► *No appetite ; Eructations always after eating, [6] . ► Aversion to food; he wishes to eat nothing; with much yawning, [6] . ► Neither hunger nor appetite; aversion to eating, because almost everything tastes sweet, [6] . ► Aversion to meat, [1] . ► Thirst. ► Much thirst (after one hour), [32] . ► Intense thirst (after six weeks), [26] . ► Violent thirst, [15] . ► Eructations and Hiccough. ► Eructations, [1] . ► Frequent eructations of a bad taste (sixth and seventh days), [6] . ► Constant eructations, [1] . [230.] ► Empty eructations and colic, at night, [1] . ► Very bitter eructations, frequently (fourth day), [6] . ► Uprisings of a sour fluid from the stomach, [6] . ► Incessant hiccough (after six weeks), [26] . ► Violent hiccough, before and after dinner (third day), [6] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► Nausea, with many eructations, on waking, for two nights, [1] . ► Qualmishness and nausea in the epigastric region, [8] . ► Qualmishness and distension of the abdomen, in the morning, in bed after waking, relieved by emission of flatus after rising, [1] . ► She frequently retched, without bringing up anything, [31] . ► Almost constant retching (second day), [27] . [240.] ► Great inclination to vomit, [6] . ► Vomiting (immediately), [22] ; (first night, second day), [28] . ► Nausea and vomiting, [22] . ► Vomited immediately, [31] . ► Violent vomiting for nearly an hour (immediately), [33] . ► Vomiting of food, [1] . ► Vomited a portion of the acid and the milk given as an antidote (soon); nausea and constant vomiting (after nine hours), [27] . ► Copious vomiting of stiff, glairy mucus (after five hours), [25] . ► Vomiting of bloody frothy liquid, [29] . ► Vomited Freely, the matters vomited had an alkaline reaction; after some milk had been given, she vomited some brown matter, streaked with blood, and containing small shreds of mucous membrane, [31] . [250.] ► Vomiting of a dark substance, resembling coffee-grounds, every time after eating or drinking (after six weeks), [26] . ► Repeated and very copious vomiting of a substance which bubbled up on the ground (immediately), [30] . ► Stomach. ► Inflammation of the alimentary canal (second day), [26] , [31] . ► Epigastric region hard, tense, and very sensitive, [33] . ► Feeling of emptiness in the stomach, at intervals, [6] . ► Feeling of emptiness in the epigastric region, especially in the sophagus, not relieved by eating , with rumbling in the bowels, [9] . ► Epigastric region painful (after twelve hours), [30] . ► Pain at pit of stomach, increased by vomiting and pressure (second day), [27] . ► Great pain in her stomach, [28] . ► Intense pain and tenderness over the epigastrium, [31] . [260.] ► Agreeable warmth in the stomach, [21] . ► Heat and burning in the stomach, lasting a long time, [6] . ► Burning and throbbing in a small spot near the left side of the pit of the stomach, [6] . ► Fulness of the stomach, though he had eaten nothing, [6] . ► Constrictive sensation in the stomach, [10] . ► Painful sensation of retraction in the stomach, in a small spot, after dinner, [6] . ► Pressure in the stomach, as if it were too full, with ineffectual attempts at eructations, [6] . ► Frequent violent pressure in the stomach, [1] . ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Violent pain in hypochondria (second day), [33] . ► Burning bruised pain in the right hypochondrium (fourth day), [6] . [270.] ► Tension and sore pain in the right hypochondriac region, extending now upward, now downward, while sitting, [6] . ► Burning tension in a small spot in the right hypochondrium, [6] . ► Pressive pinching beneath the left short ribs, not affected by respiration, [4] . ► Stitches in the left side beneath the ribs, [8] . ► A stitch in the right hypochondriac region, followed by burning, relieved by pressure, but soon again appearing not far from the same place, in the evening (third day), [6] . ► A violent stitch in the left hypochondriac region on stooping, so that she started up in fright, [6] . ► Umbilical and Sides. ► Griping beneath the umbilicus, followed by a hard stool (twelfth day), [6] . ► Violent griping in the umbilical region, with a sensation of emptiness; it extends into the pit of the stomach, and there causes oppression, [4] . ► Griping extending from the umbilical region to both sides, very violent, with rumbling, [4] . ► Fine griping in the abdominal muscles, in and below the umbilical region, [9] . [280.] ► Violent jerklike griping externally in a small spot in the left side of the abdomen, more violent on every inspiration, [4] . ► Constant sticking pain as from needles, about the umbilicus, [4] . ► General Abdomen. ► Distension of the abdomen, followed by profuse emission of flatus, [6] . ► Abdomen distended, tense, tormenting her all day, [1] . ► Great distension of the abdomen, in the evening, disappearing after lying down, [6] . ► Abdomen large as far as the stomach; it is very distressing to her, [1] . ► Constant fermentation in the abdomen, sometimes firmly seated low down in the abdomen, with whistling noises, [1] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, [1] . ► Rumbling and dull pain in the abdomen, during and after eating, [1] . ► Rumbling in the abdomen, as from emptiness, while sitting, [5] . [290.] ► Rumbling and gurgling in the abdomen, [8] . ► Profuse emission of offensive flatus (first day), [6] . ► Feeling of emptiness in the abdomen, with rumbling (after one hour), [4] . ► Painful empty sensation in the abdomen, in the morning, after the usual stool (fifth day), [3] . ► Disagreeable anxious sensation in the whole abdomen, relieved by emission of flatus, and entirely relieved by a stool, [4] . ► Pains in abdomen (after six weeks), [26] . ► Severe pains in bowels (first night), [26] . ► Feeling of fulness in the abdomen, with distension, after a moderate meal, [8] . ► Contractive sensation in the intestines, with dull pain, [10] . ► Griping, here and there, in the abdomen, without sensation of flatulence (fourth day), [6] . [300.] ► Griping in the abdomen several times a day, followed by unusually profuse emissions of very offensive flatus, [1] . ► Colicky griping in the abdomen , on motion, and emission of flatus, [1] . ► Cutting griping in the abdomen, while standing and walking, disappearing while sitting, [5] . ► Violent cutting griping, extending from the rectum to the upper abdomen, followed by desire for stool, that was somewhat softer than usual, [2] . ► Pressive pain in the distended abdomen, and shooting into the body on every step, [8] . ► Cutting pain through the middle of the abdomen, beneath the umbilicus, [4] . ► Violent cutting in the abdomen, while sitting, standing, and walking, [3] . ► Colic, in the morning in bed, [1] . ► Iliac Regions. ► Sticking pains, as from needles, in the abdominal ring, [2] . ► Dull stitches in the right inguinal region, during dinner, [6] . [310.] ► Burning stitch in the left groin (after eleven hours), [2] . ► Burning stitch in the right groin, in the evening, [6] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Rectum. ► *Prolapsus of the rectum as if everted, while urinating , [1] . ► Inactivity of the rectum; he is able with great pressure to discharge only a portion of the stool, [1] . ► Sticking pain in the rectum, [1] . ► *Smarting in the rectum and anus, with a soft stool, [1] . ► Anus. ► *Swollen hæmorrhoids in the anus, with burning sore pain, [1] . ► *Swollen blue hæmorrhoids in the anus, with pain on pressure, [1] . ► Burning in the anus, after an ordinary stool, [6] . ► Pressure in the anus, [1] . [320.] ► Cutting in the anus during the evacuation of a soft stool, [6] . ► Burning stitches in the anus, [3] . ► Itching in the anus , with sore pain and crawling sticking, [1] . ► Much itching and tickling in the anus (second day), [1] . ► Violent itching in the rectum, as from threadworms, [1] . STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Colic and diarrha, [22] . ► Fecal diarrha (after ten hours), [1] . ► Stool soft (first three days), [6] . ► Diarrha four times (after the first hard stool), with tenesmus, and with rumbling and gurgling in the abdomen (fourth day), [6] . ► *Diarrha, followed by violent burning in the anus , in the evening, and next morning (after six days), [6] . [330.] ► Diarrha-like stool, with smarting in the rectum, [1] . ► *A thin watery stool passed unnoticed while urinating, without previous straining, [3] . ► Thin stool, after eating, [3] . ► Soft stool, with emission of flatus, contractive burning and sticking in the rectum, and a sensation as though the stool and flatus went back, [1] . ► Stool, with cutting and qualmishness in the abdomen, as from taking cold; after the stool he felt better (after twenty-four hours), [9] . ► Great desire for stool, in the morning, yet the evacuation is difficult, [1] . ► Stool in small pieces, with pressure (third day), [6] . ► Stool hard (fourth day), [6] . ► Stool at one time hard, at another soft, [6] . ► Blood with the stool, for several mornings, [1] . [340.] ► Profuse discharge of blood with the stool, [1] . ► Hard difficult stool, in morning, softer in afternoon (sixth day), [6] . ► Constipation. ► Constipation, [33] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Bladder. ► Weakness of the bladder, [18] . ► Urethra. ► Cutting very far back in the urethra, while urinating during stool, [1] . ► Sticking biting in the orifice of the urethra, immediately after urinating, [5] . ► Micturition. ► Urging to urinate; tenesmus in the bladder, with desire to urinate; almost nothing passes, though that which passes is without pain, [8] . ► Desire to urinate, yet he is obliged to wait awhile before the urine passes, [1] . ► *Frequent desire to urinate, and emission of much urine , [1] . ► Frequent desire to urinate, and discharge of a greater quantity of urine than of the drink taken, [3] . [350.] ► Frequent desire to urinate, with scanty discharge (after seventy-two hours), [3] . ► She was frequently obliged to rise at night to urinate, though she passed but little at a time, and without pain, [6] . ► Constant desire to urinate, with scanty but frequent discharge of urine and tenesmus after micturition, [8] . ► Frequent micturition, with urging and profuse emission, [5] . ► Frequent copious micturition, though she drank little (fourth day), [6] . ► Unusually profuse discharge of watery urine, [8] . ► Passed about 500 grammes of urine, which was found to contain Muriatic acid (after nineteen hours), [30] . ► Frequent involuntary micturition, [18] . ► Passes her urine in bed, [31] . ► Emission of urine slow, as though the bladder had no power to expel it, [9] . ► Urine. [360.] ► Increased urine, [21] . ► Urine visibly increased and pale yellow (first and second days), [8] . ► Urine increased a quantity, and pale like water (after one day), [6] . ► Diminished urine, with burning (first day), [6] . ► The urine is turbid, white like milk, when passed, [1] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Erections, in the morning in bed (second day), [8] . ► Frequent though weak erections (fourth day), [6] . ► Feeling of weakness in the genitals, no erections whatever, and relaxed flabby penis (after twenty-four hours), [9] . ► The prepuce easily becomes inflamed, [1] . ► Pain on the margin of the prepuce, as if torn or wounded, [1] . [370.] ► Boring tension extending from the right testicle to the penis, [2] . ► A violent burning stitch in the posterior portion of the penis, [3] . ► Increased sexual desire (primary effect), [6] . ► Sensation as if an emission would occur woke him in the morning; afterwards, with a slight erection, emission of a watery, frothy liquid, without odor, followed by a long-continuing erection, with tensive pain in the penis, [8] . ► Female. ► Leucorrha (tenth and eleventh days), [6] . ► Distress in the genitals, as before menstruation, [8] . ► Stitching pain in the vagina, [1] . ► Menses ten days too early, with colic, [6] . ► Menses six days too early, without other trouble, [6] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Larynx. ► Epiglottis swollen, white, and corroded (after six hours), [32] . ► Voice. [380.] ► Voice thick and inarticulate, [31] . ► Hoarseness, for eight days, [11] . ► Unusual catarrhal hoarseness, [17] . ► Cough and Expectoration. ► Inclination to cough, with sticking griping in the throat, followed by increased secretion of mucus, that at last collects in masses, [23] . ► Violent cough, at 3 A.M., with nausea and vomiting of bile, [1] . ► Violent cough, as if it would burst out the sternum, from dinner till towards evening, especially on talking. laughing, and yawning, with pains as if sore and bruised, [6] . ► Tickling in the throat, causing a short hacking cough (fifth day), [6] . ► Violent hooping-cough, followed by audible, rumbling, extending downward in the chest, [1] . ► Dry cough, with exertion, day and night (after six days), [6] . ► Frequent dry cough, from tickling in the chest (fourth day), [6] . [390.] ► Short, dry, hacking cough, with burning in the throat, [6] . ► Loose cough, with some expectoration of mucus, in the evening and morning (sixth and seventh days), [6] . ► Cough, with bloody expectoration, [20] . ► Respiration. ► Expiration of white fumes, [29] . ► Sighing, [12] . ► Respiration frequent, and sighing (after twelve hours), [30] . ► He snores loudly before midnight, and tosses about, but then can be easily awakened, [1] . ► She breathed with snoring, occasionally stridulous noise, as if there was some obstruction in the larynx, [31] . ► Deep respiration, with groaning, [12] . ► Difficult, wheezing inspiration; expiration easy (second day), [27] . [400.] ► Much difficulty in breathing; moist râles could be heard all over the chest (after three or four hours), [32] . ► Suffocating sensation (immediately), [24] . CHEST. ► Burning in the right chest externally, also in a small spot in the middle of the sternum, with a feeling internally as if something were sticking into it, afterwards only a sticking in the same place, [6] . ► Pinching tension beneath the short ribs, frequently obliging deep inspiration, and disappearing after emission of flatus, [4] . ► Pressive pinching in the chest, without tightness of breath, [4] . ► Tensive boring in the chest, persistent during inspiration and expiration, [2] . ► Asthmatic pressure upon the chest in paroxysms, [1] . ► Oppression transversely across the chest, in the evening, while walking and sitting, [1] . ► Painful oppression of the chest, especially on the right side, [4] . ► Sticking pain in the chest, on violent motion, and on breathing, [1] . [410.] ► Stitches as from needles in the right true ribs, on expiration, while sitting, [5] . ► Slow broad stitches extending upward in the sides of the chest externally, [9] . ► A boring stitch in the right intercostal muscles, not affecting respiration, while sitting, [2] . ► A tensive jerking stitch extending from the left false ribs to the right ribs, [2] . ► Sore pain and cutting in the chest, also with inclination to cough, [6] . ► Scraping in the chest, with cough and expectoration of mucus, [6] . ► Front. ► Tensive pain on the sternum that prevents breathing, as if it came from the stomach, with pain in the spot, even on touch, [1] . ► Violent pressure in the sternum above the pit of the stomach, extending up to the chest, in the evening, [1] . ► Cutting thrusts internally in the middle of the sternum, with dull pressure posteriorly in the thorax, general oppression of the chest, and tightness of breath, by paroxysms all day, [9] . ► Stitches beneath the sternum, just above the pit of the stomach, [8] . ► Sides. [420.] ► Pressive pinching in the right side of the chest, always aggravated by inspiration, [4] . ► Pressure and bruised pain in the left side of the chest, [1] . ► Sticking pressure in the right side of the chest, beneath the nipple, gradually increasing and decreasing, [4] . ► Pressive pain on the right side of the chest that constantly became more violent, not affected by breathing, [4] . ► Pressive pain in the left side of the chest posteriorly, close to the spine, on inspiration, [4] . ► Stitches between two true ribs of the left side, on expiration, [5] . ► Dull stitch in the left side of the chest, with cough, in the evening, [6] . ► Sharp stitches in the left side of the chest, on the lowest true ribs, not affecting respiration, [9] . ► Mammæ. ► Drawing sensation in the right breast beneath the nipple, extending towards the neck, [4] . ► Violent stitches in the right nipple, [4] . [430.] ► Fine burning stitches externally beneath the left mamma, [6] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. ► Sticking in the præcordial region, so that she could only become erect with difficulty, with arrest of breathing, disappearing on rubbing (seventh day), [6] . ► Stitches deep in the præcordial region, extending to the axilla and back, with sticking in the thigh, extending down to the knee, while sitting, disappearing on rising, in the evening, [6] . ► Fine stitches below the præcordial region, extending thence into the left costal region, with tearing behind the left ear, [6] . ► Heart's Action. ► Beating of the heart so violent during the fever at night, that he felt in the face, [3] . ► Pulse. ► Acceleration of the pulse, [21] . ► *Pulse rapid and feeble (after three-quarters of an hour), [31] . ► *Pulse very small and frequent (after twelve days), [30] . ► Pulse 130, *very feeble (first day), 120 (second day), [31] . ► Pulse varying between 96 and 120, [33] . [440.] ► Pulse 84, and pretty full (after over one hour), [32] . ► Every third pulse intermits, [1] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► The posterior cervical glands are swollen, with tensive pain on turning the head, [6] . ► Back. ► Burning, extending from the coccyx up the back, as if beneath the skin (fourth day), [6] . ► Pressure upon the spine, while walking in the open air, disappearing while standing and sitting, [5] . ► Pressure in the middle and left side of the back, as from much stooping, [5] . ► Pressive pain in the middle of the back, while standing and sitting, as from long stooping, [5] . ► Backache, as from a sprain, in the back and scapulæ; after continued writing, with the back bent over, [3] . ► Violent sticking in the left side of the back, so that she dared not move, although it was relieved by moving, [6] . ► Painful stitches in the left side of the back, while sitting, [5] . ► Dorsal. [450.] ► Drawing tensive pain alternately between the scapulæ and in the lower short ribs, not affecting respiration, [4] . ► Sticking in the scapulæ, [1] . ► Sharp stitches, with fine drawing and a feeling of heat, in the scapulæ, [9] . ► Violent stitches in the lower portion of the right scapula, beneath the axilla, [6] . ► Fine pressive stitches on the lower margin of the right scapula, [4] . ► Lumbar. ► Frequent sticking in the small of the back, on rising from stooping (fourth day), [6] . ► A starting burning stitch in the sacrum, [6] . ► Fine drawing tearing extending from the middle of the sacrum towards the lumbar vertebræ, [3] . >>>>> Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
